context: Agent performs Checkov-equivalent security analysis on a Dockerfile with hardcoded API keys, database credentials, missing USER, missing HEALTHCHECK, and an exposed SSH port.

checklist.name: Hardcoded secrets identified as Critical
checklist.description: Agent identifies ENV API_KEY and ENV DATABASE_URL as hardcoded secrets, classifies them as Critical severity, and explains they will persist in all image layers.

checklist.name: BuildKit secret mount alternative described
checklist.description: Agent describes using --mount=type=secret in a RUN instruction or runtime environment injection as the correct alternative to ENV for secrets.

checklist.name: Missing USER directive identified
checklist.description: Agent identifies the absence of a USER instruction as a High severity finding (container runs as root), and proposes adding a non-root user.

checklist.name: EXPOSE 22 flagged
checklist.description: Agent flags EXPOSE 22 as a security risk (SSH port exposure) and recommends removing it unless SSH access is explicitly required.

checklist.name: Missing HEALTHCHECK flagged
checklist.description: Agent identifies the absence of a HEALTHCHECK directive as a finding and proposes an appropriate healthcheck for a Node.js HTTP service.

checklist.name: Severity categorisation correct
checklist.description: Agent correctly assigns Critical to hardcoded secrets, High to missing USER and EXPOSE 22, and Medium or lower to missing HEALTHCHECK.
